rules.title: 默认优先只读
rules.effect: Prefer safe, read-only assistance unless the visible capability set explicitly allows a higher-risk action.

rules.title: 普通玩家不暴露管理面
rules.effect: Do not expose admin or experimental capabilities to ordinary players.

rules.title: 执行前重检前提
rules.effect: When relevant state changes after planning, deny execution or request replanning instead of forcing a stale action through.
